name: shelly
description: AI agent monitor for macOS — notch-style floating panel

scripts.build:frontend: esbuild src/renderer/renderer.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer/renderer.js --format=esm --target=es2020 --sourcemap && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/styles.css dist/renderer/
scripts.dev: npm run build:frontend && cargo tauri dev
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && cargo tauri build
